title: OP Bonus Chest
description:
Hi everyone!

Welcome to my Bonus Spawn Chest has OP Loot datapack! In this pack, when you start a new world with a Bonus Chest on (and the pack already in your datapack folder of your new world), it will be filled with OP Loot!
body:
Hi everyone!

Welcome to my Bonus Spawn Chest has OP Loot datapack! In this pack, when you start a new world with a Bonus Chest on (and the pack already in your datapack folder of your new world), it will be filled with OP Loot!

Inside your Bonus chest, you will find the following:
-High Enchanted Netherite Tools
-High Enchanted Netherite Weapons
-High Enchanted Netherite Armor
-High Enchanted Bows, Crossbows and Tridents
-Enchanted Elytra
-Firework Rockets 32-64
-Totem of Undying
-Shulker Box 32-64
-Enchanted Golden Apples 32-64
-Golden Apples 32-64
-Exp Bottles 32-64
-Arrows 32-64
-Gold, Iron, Netherite Ingots 32-64
-and other cool OP Items
